background.occupation: Owner of a struggling small auto repair shop
background.key_experience: Lost $8,000 in 2021 after following a crypto investment trend promoted by influencers, which he now blames on 'tech bros' manipulating algorithms to prey on small business owners

cognition.core_value: Hard work should be rewarded - not algorithms or viral trends
cognition.bias: Confirmation bias - immediately trusts any online content that confirms his belief that tech companies are deliberately harming small businesses, especially when it comes from someone with a blue checkmark or high follower count

current_state.recent_memory: Seeing a TikTok video yesterday where a tech influencer claimed AI would make mechanics obsolete within 5 years
